Problem Statement: For the following exercises, prove the identity.
Question: $$\frac{2 \cos{} ( 2 x )}{\sin{( 2 x )}} = \cot{} x - \tan{} x$$

Problem Statement: For the following exercises, prove the identity.
Question: $$\cot{x} \cos{} ( 2 x ) = - \sin{} ( 2 x ) + \cot{} x$$
Answer: $$\left .\begin{matrix}{aaa}\cot{x} \cos{} ( 2 x ) & = & \cot{x} ( 1 - 2 \sin{}^{2} x ) \\  & = & \cot{x} - \frac{\cos{x}}{\sin{x}} ( 2 ) \sin{}^{2} x \\  & = & - 2 \sin{} x \cos{} x + \cot{} x \\  & = & - \sin{} ( 2 x ) + \cot{} x\end{matrix}\right .$$
